name: City Bus Passenger Picking Game
description: Welcome to the idle bus traffic empire tycoon simulator game to build and manage your big human transportation business. Start development with an empty building and develop it by investing in various rooms and buying buses. Supermarket, restaurant, waiting room, toilet - these are just some of the departments of your future business. Will you be the richest millionaire tycoon in this idle simulator game? Develop your station, buy counters with goods, upgrade the level of staff, hire managers, automate and get more money from visitor service.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
